description.text: Battle your way through these brightly coloured block formations on route to take down your opposition. One Base.

es.original: Battle your way through these brightly coloured block formations on route to take down your opposition. One Base.
es.translation:
Un escenario lleno de bloques muy coloridos.
Un núcleo.

fr.original: Battle your way through these brightly coloured block formations on route to take down your opposition. One Base.
fr.translation: Frayez-vous un chemin parmi les blocs flashy pour vaincre vos ennemis ! Une base.

de.original: Battle your way through these brightly coloured block formations on route to take down your opposition. One Base.
de.translation: Kämpft euch durch farbenfrohe Blockformationen und vernichtet eure Gegner! Eine Basis.

ru.original: Battle your way through these brightly coloured block formations on route to take down your opposition. One Base.
ru.translation: Разбивай эти цветные блоки и прокладывай путь к вражеской базе. Затем просто уничтожь врага. Одна база.

pt.original: Battle your way through these brightly coloured block formations on route to take down your opposition. One Base.
pt.translation: Atravesse essas formações de blocos coloridos para derrotar os adversários. Uma Base.
